/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -g3 -O3 -march=native -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/all_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/all_test.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_test.dir/test_complex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_test.dir/test_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_test.dir/test_simple.cpp.o -o all_test  /usr/local/share/vcpkg/packages/catch2_x64-linux/lib/libCatch2.a /usr/local/share/vcpkg/packages/catch2_x64-linux/lib/manual-link/libCatch2Main.a /usr/local/share/vcpkg/packages/catch2_x64-linux/lib/libCatch2.a
